type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Sulphur was incorrectly reported in 2021. The tonnage reported as SO2 in 2021 was actually tonnage of S2. The delta of 2021 to 2022 SO2 was about 1 tonne (0.3%). The 2021 SO2 tonnage will be corrected.
